_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: We reported that human MPNST cell lines, including NF1-associated S462 cells and sporadic 26T cells, are sensitive to the CDK4/6 inhibitor, palbociclib
